arts.ttl: 'Unlikely Potter or Moyes will replace Cooper' | Who's next for Leicester?
arts.sum: Following Steve Cooper's departure from Leicester City, Sky Sports' Danyal Khan says it's unlikely that Graham Potter or David Moyes will replace the Welshman at the club.

arts.ttl: Sunderland's Chris Rigg 'bound for top club' as Newcastle United told why it won't be them
arts.sum: Sunderland starlet Chris Rigg is bound for a 'top club in the UK or Europe' rather than Newcastle United, according to Carlton Palmer. Palmer, who made 18 appearances for England throughout his career, thinks that Rigg would be a great signing for Newcastle..

arts.sum: And he would improve further in the 2023/24 season, scoring 14 goals and adding 14 assists across 48 appearances in all competitions, helping PSV to the Eredivisie title in the process. Johan Bakayoko was born in Belgium in 2003 and is already an established international footballer, playing for the country of his birth.
